data.message: Engine offers 'Play Elusive and move to Study (Aberrant Gateway)' while Skids is already AT Study, which is the only revealed location. Elusive's move has no valid destination (no other revealed enemy-free location exists), so this option should not offer a move to my current location — it should either be unavailable or at minimum not move me to my own location.
